title: kohautia gracilis
intro: Kohautia gracilis, also known as the delicate kohautia, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and various infections. The roots and leaves of Kohautia gracilis are believed to have antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, contributing to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Kohautia gracilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use.
